title: pixooclock: lighten default hands one step and extend default lengths by 2px

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Applying default hand style tweak: +1 Radix level for hour/minute/second and +2px default lengths for all hands; update tests accordingly.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented default hand style update in pixooclock: colors lightened by one Radix step (hour 10, minute 11, second 6) and default lengths increased by 2px (18/25/30). Updated parser/color expectations in tests. Validation: uv run python -m py_compile demos/pixooclock.py demos/kanbus_clock.py; uv run pytest tests/test_demo_three_hand_clock.py tests/test_kanbus_clock.py -q (35 passed). Pending your visual confirmation before closing.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Adjustment requested: change hand-length defaults from +2px to +1px over baseline (17/24/29). Updating code/tests now.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Adjusted per request: default hand lengths are now +1px over baseline (17/24/29), not +2px. Validation: uv run python -m py_compile demos/pixooclock.py; uv run pytest tests/test_demo_three_hand_clock.py tests/test_kanbus_clock.py -q (35 passed). Pending your visual confirmation before closure.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Correction: user wants hand lengths +4px from original baseline (16/23/28 -> 20/27/32). Applying now.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Applied correction: default hand lengths are now +4px vs original baseline (hour/minute/second = 20/27/32). Validation: uv run python -m py_compile demos/pixooclock.py; uv run pytest tests/test_demo_three_hand_clock.py tests/test_kanbus_clock.py -q (35 passed).
